creator: cpe@fullrate.dk
text:
Kernel crashed at boot on a ProLiant DL360 G6, reporting run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 60 seconds for xpt_config until it times out at 300 seconds and crashes, reporting:

KBD: enter: panic
[thread pid 0 tid 100000]
Stopped at  kdb_enter+0x3d: movq $0,0687f60(%rip)

How-To-Repeat: Happens during boot, every time.
